attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 NCB1.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY   AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY
 ,NCB1.START_TV_DT     AS START_TV_DT
 ,NCB1.END_TV_DT     AS END_TV_DT
 ,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_KEY    AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,NCB1.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,NCB1.PROCESS_DATE      AS PROCESS_DATE
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)  AS PRODUCT_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.SALESREP_NUMBER,'=')   AS SALESREP_NUMBER
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)   AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1,-999)AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 ,NCB1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT     AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
 ,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT    AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT
 ,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT     AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
 ,NCB1.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY       AS DV_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NCB1.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT    AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
 ,NCB1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
 ,NCB1.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT      AS LINE_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,'=')   AS  INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,'=')   AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,'=')   AS REVENUE_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG,'=')    AS RMA_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_SS_CD,'=')    AS  SS_CODE
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,'=')   AS CANCELLED_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,'=')  AS ACQUISITION_FLAG
 ,CASE
  WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE 'N'
  END           AS DD_OVERLAY_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,'=')  AS IC_REVENUE_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,'=')   AS CHARGES_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,'=')   AS MISC_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG,'=')   AS SERVICE_FLAG
 ,CASE WHEN NCB1.DD_NCB_SS_CD IN ('QTC','BV') THEN  
  (CASE WHEN (NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG='Y' 
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'
   OR (CASE WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y'
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y')) 
   OR NCB1.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CCW-RF-EXCESS'    
   THEN 'N'
   ELSE 'Y' END)
 ELSE
  (CASE WHEN (NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG='Y' 
   /* OR NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' Removed from CORP flag derivation for CG1 orders */ 
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'
   OR (CASE WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y'
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y')) THEN 'N'
   ELSE 'Y' END) 
 END AS DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,'=') AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG
 ,NCB1.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE     AS DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
 ,NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,'=') AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
 ,COALESCE
 (
 CASE
  WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = -999 THEN 'N'
  WHEN  ESP_RULE.TERRITORY_NODE_LEVEL1_CODE= 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N'
  WHEN  PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE='SP' THEN
   CASE
    WHEN ESP_RULE.RULE_CD IS NULL THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
   END
  WHEN  PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE='DVAR' THEN  'Y'
     WHEN   PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE<>'SP' AND PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE<> 'DVAR' THEN 'N'
 END,'='
 )          AS SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG
 ,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_USER     AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_DTM     AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_USER     AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM     AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,NCB1.CONVERSION_RT                 AS CONVERSION_RT
 ,NCB1.CONVERSION_DT     AS CONVERSION_DT                 
 ,NCB1.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 ,NCB1.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,NCB1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,NCB1.DV_PRODUCT_KEY             AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,NCB1.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
   ,NCB1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG   /* NRS PI3 Change */
 /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
,CAST (-999 AS INTEGER) AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,'ERP' AS TRX_TYPE_CD
,CAST (-999 AS INTEGER) AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 /* END Q2FY18 XAAS*/
  ,-999 ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY    
 ,-999 XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY   
 ,'N'  TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG         
 ,'N'  HISTORY_FLG 
 ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT 
 				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 
 FROM
 (
  SELECT
  NCB.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY      AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
  CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE)  AS START_TV_DT,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
  NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY       AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT    AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  FMNI.PROCESS_DATE        AS PROCESS_DATE,
  NCB.PRODUCT_KEY              AS PRODUCT_KEY,
  NCB.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER      AS SALESREP_NUMBER,
  NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY       AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  SOL.DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  SO.DD_NCB_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  SO.DD_NCB_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  CASE
   WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999
   WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
   THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
   THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
   THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   ELSE -999
  END         AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1,
  CAST(
  SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT * 
  CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
  )
            AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
  CAST(
  SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT * 
  CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
           AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
  CAST(
  SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT * 
  CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
  )         AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT,
  CAST(
  SOL.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY*
  CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
  )         AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
  /* Used NCB.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY instead of NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY to derive the standard price -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/
  CAST(
  CAST(((NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE *
  NCB.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY *    
  NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/100.000000)AS DECIMAL(18,6))* 
  COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
  CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
  )          AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
  NCB.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  NCB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT     AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
  SO.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG   AS DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,
  SO.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG   AS DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  CASE WHEN NCB.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV') THEN SO.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG  
     WHEN NCB.SS_CODE='CG' AND NCB.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN SO.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG  
     ELSE NCB.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END AS DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,  
  (
  CASE
   WHEN NCB.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'
   THEN 'Y'
   ELSE 'N'
  END 
  )          AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
  NCB.SS_CODE       AS DD_NCB_SS_CD,
  SO.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG    AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
  SO.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG    AS DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,
  SO.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG    AS DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  SOL.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG     AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
  SOL.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG     AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
  SOL.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG     AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG ,
  SOL.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG  AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
  NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE  AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,
  NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  SOL.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG  AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
  USER         AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)     AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER         AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)     AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
  CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))   AS CONVERSION_RT,
  NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE    AS CONVERSION_DT ,
     NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NCB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  NCB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
  NCB.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ,
NCB.POB_TYPE_CD,
NCB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM 
  (
   SELECT
   NSCAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
   NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN COALESCE(NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) ELSE NSOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  END AS PRODUCT_KEY,
   COALESCE (NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,0) AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
   /* derived Bundle quantity to calculate standard price  -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/
      CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET', 'BIB OFFSET') THEN   (COALESCE (-1 * NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0))
   ELSE COALESCE (NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) 
   END AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,     
    /*Added the precision for attribution pct -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/
   ((COALESCE (NSOLT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0))/100.00000000) AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
   NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   NSOLT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
   NSCAT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NSCAT.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
   NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   NSCAT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
   NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
   NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME ORDER_DATETIME,
   NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
   NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
   '=' SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG , /* Added by OM LSS team for Q2FY14 */
   NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, /* Added by OM LSS team */
   NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   NSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   COALESCE (NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NSOVT.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
  ,NSOA.POB_TYPE_CD
  ,NSOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
   				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NSOLT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NSOLT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NSOLT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT,  /*added joins on this table as part of Q1FY15 Offer attribution*/
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT, /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */   
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV NSCAT,
   $$STGDB.WI_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION NSOA
   WHERE  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */   
   /* AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY15*/
   AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL', 'SBP')  /* XAAS FCM Q4FY16*/ 
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSCAT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'  
   AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00' /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */ 
   AND NSCAT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOT.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
         AND COALESCE (NSOT.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
   AND NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
   AND NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
   AND NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV')
   AND NSOT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
   AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/

 
    UNION ALL 
    
      SELECT
   NSCAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
   NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN COALESCE(NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) ELSE NSOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  END AS PRODUCT_KEY,
   COALESCE (NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,0) AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
   /* derived Bundle quantity to calculate standard price  -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/
      CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET', 'BIB OFFSET') THEN   (COALESCE (-1 * NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0))
   ELSE COALESCE (NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) 
   END AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,  
         /*Added the precision for attribution pct -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/  
   ((COALESCE (NSOLT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0))/100.00000000) AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
   NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   NSOLT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
   NSCAT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NSCAT.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
   NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   NSCAT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
   NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
   NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME ORDER_DATETIME,
   NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
   NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
   NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
   CASE WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG ELSE NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG  
         END ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG, /* Added by OM LSS for Hybrid Scenario */  
   NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
         NSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
         NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
         COALESCE (NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NSOVT.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
 ,NSOA.POB_TYPE_CD
  ,NSOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
     				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NSOLT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NSOLT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NSOLT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT, /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV NSCAT,
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT,
   $$STGDB.WI_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION NSOA
   WHERE NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
   /* AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15*/
   AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL', 'SBP')  /* FCM XAAS Q4FY16*/ 
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSCAT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
      AND NSOLVT.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
   AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
      AND NSOTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'  
   AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00' /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
   AND NSCAT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
   AND NSOT.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
 and  coalesce ( nsot.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
   AND NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
   AND NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
   AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = 'CG'
   AND NSOT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
   AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/

   ) NCB
  CROSS JOIN
  (
   SELECT 
   NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
   NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
   BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
   FROM 
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, 
   $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
   WHERE NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
   AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
  ) FMNI
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER_TV NSEC
  ON (NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSEC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND NSEC.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
 
  INNER  JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SOL_NCB_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION SOL
  ON (SOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NCB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND SOL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND SOL.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
 
  INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_NCB_TV  SO
  ON ( SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND SO.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
  ON (NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=NCB.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
  AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=COALESCE(CAST(NCB.ORDER_DATETIME AS DATE),
  CAST(NCB.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE))
  AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='Corporate')
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV
  WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')CUST_ACCT
  ON SO.DD_NCB_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=CUST_ACCT.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY
  AND CUST_ACCT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE='BILL_TO'
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT 
  NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
  NEP.PARTY_KEY PARTY_KEY
  FROM 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA,
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
  WHERE NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
  AND NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
  AND NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' ) PARTY
  ON SO.DD_NCB_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY=PARTY.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
  SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV 
  WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') SOLD_TO_PARENT
  ON PARTY.PARTY_KEY=SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
  SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV 
  WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') BILL_TO_PARENT
  ON CUST_ACCT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
 ) NCB1
 
 LEFT JOIN( 
 SELECT  
 DISTINCT 
 EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 EST.TERRITORY_NODE_LEVEL1_CODE ,
 ESP.RULE_CD RULE_CD
 FROM 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST,
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHN_SP_NODES ESP
 WHERE EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ESP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ESP_RULE
 ON (NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ESP_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)
 
 LEFT JOIN(
 SELECT 
 DISTINCT 
 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE
 FROM 
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY) ELST
 ON( ELST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE LIKE 'CORP%.%REVENUE'
 AND SUBSTR(ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE,1,9) <>'I/C CISCO')
 
 LEFT JOIN(
 SELECT 
 DISTINCT 
 NCPC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE, 
 NCPST.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV NCPST
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPC
 ON NCPST.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY=NCPC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  AND  NCPST.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') PTC
 ON NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = PTC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY
  
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      
 ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID

 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC   /* NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS NCB FLAG Column */
 ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
 AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE

SELECT
  NCB1.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY               AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_APPLIED_KEY
  ,NCB1.START_TV_DT                 AS START_TV_DT
  ,NCB1.END_TV_DT                 AS END_TV_DT
  ,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_KEY                AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
  ,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY               AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,NCB1.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT          AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  ,NCB1.PROCESS_DATE              AS PROCESS_DATE
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)          AS PRODUCT_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.SALESREP_NUMBER,'=')   AS SALESREP_NUMBER
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)   AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1,-999)AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  ,NCB1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT     AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
  ,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT    AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT
  ,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT     AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT
  ,NCB1.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY       AS DV_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
  ,NCB1.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT    AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
  ,NCB1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
  ,NCB1.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT      AS LINE_SEQUENCE_ID
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,'=')   AS  INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,'=') AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,'=')   AS REVENUE_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG,'=')    AS RMA_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_SS_CD,'=')    AS  SS_CODE
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,'=')   AS CANCELLED_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,'=')  AS ACQUISITION_FLAG
  ,CASE
   WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
   THEN 'Y'
   ELSE 'N'
   END           AS DD_OVERLAY_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,'=')  AS IC_REVENUE_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,'=')   AS CHARGES_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,'=')   AS MISC_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG,'=')   AS SERVICE_FLAG
  , 
  CASE WHEN NCB1.DD_NCB_SS_CD IN ('QTC','BV') THEN  
  (CASE
   WHEN (NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG='Y' 
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'
   OR (CASE
     WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
     THEN 'Y'
     ELSE 'N'
    END  ) ='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y'
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS'
    AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU'
     AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y') ) 
   OR NCB1.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CCW-RF-EXCESS' 
   THEN 'N'
   ELSE 'Y'
  END)
  ELSE
  (CASE
   WHEN (NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG='Y' 
   /* OR NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' Removed from CORP flag derivation for CG1 orders */ 
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'
   OR (CASE
     WHEN ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
     THEN 'Y'
     ELSE 'N'
    END  ) ='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'
   OR NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y'
   OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' 
   AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU'
   AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y')) THEN 'N'
   ELSE 'Y'
  END) END AS DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,'=') AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG
  ,NCB1.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE     AS DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
  ,NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,'=') AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
  ,COALESCE
  (
  CASE
   WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = -999 THEN 'N'
   WHEN  ESP_RULE.TERRITORY_NODE_LEVEL1_CODE= 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N'
   WHEN  PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE='SP' THEN
    CASE
     WHEN ESP_RULE.RULE_CD IS NULL THEN 'Y'
     ELSE 'N'
    END
   WHEN  PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE='DVAR' THEN  'Y'
      WHEN   PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE<>'SP' AND PTC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE<> 'DVAR' THEN 'N'
  END,'='
  )          AS SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG
  ,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_USER     AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_DTM     AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
  ,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_USER     AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM     AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
  ,NCB1.CONVERSION_RT                 AS CONVERSION_RT
  ,NCB1.CONVERSION_DT     AS CONVERSION_DT   
  ,NCB1.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
  ,NCB1.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
  ,NCB1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       AS  DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
  ,NCB1.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
      ,NCB1.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
	,NCB1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 Change */
  /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
,CAST (-999 AS INTEGER) AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
  ,'ERP' AS TRX_TYPE_CD
,CAST (-999 AS INTEGER) AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
  /* END Q2FY18 XAAS*/
 ,-999 ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY    
 ,-999 XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY   
 ,'N'  TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG         
 ,'N'  HISTORY_FLG 
 ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT 
 				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM
  (
   SELECT
   NCB.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY      AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
   CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE)  AS START_TV_DT,
   CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
   NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY       AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
   NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT    AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   FMNI.PROCESS_DATE        AS PROCESS_DATE,
      SOL. DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY      AS PRODUCT_KEY,
   NCB. BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER      AS SALESREP_NUMBER,
   NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY       AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   SOL.DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   SO.DD_NCB_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
   SO.DD_NCB_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   CASE
    WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999
    WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
    THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
    THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
    THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    ELSE -999
   END         AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1,
   CAST(
   SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT * 
   CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
   )
             AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   CAST(
   SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT * 
   CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
            AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
   CAST(
   SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT * 
   CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
   )         AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT,
   CAST(
   SOL.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY*
   CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
   )         AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
   CAST(
   CAST(((NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE *
   NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY *
   NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)/100.000000)AS DECIMAL(18,6))* 
   COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
   CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
   )          AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
   NCB.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NCB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT     AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
   SO.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG   AS DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,
   SO.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG   AS DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
   CASE WHEN NCB.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV') THEN SO.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG  
   WHEN NCB.SS_CODE='CG' AND NCB.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN SO.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG ELSE 
   NCB.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END AS DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,
   (
   CASE
    WHEN NCB.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
   END 
   )          AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
   NCB.SS_CODE       AS DD_NCB_SS_CD,
   SO.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG    AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
   SO.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG    AS DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,
   SO.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG    AS DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
   SOL.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG     AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
   SOL.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG     AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
   SOL.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG     AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG ,
   SOL.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG  AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
   NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE  AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,
   NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
   SOL.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG  AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
   USER         AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)     AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER         AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)     AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
   CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))   AS CONVERSION_RT,
   NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE    AS CONVERSION_DT,
    CASE WHEN (NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL) THEN  'BUNDLE' ELSE 'STANDALONE'  END  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,  /* OA - Q3FY15 */
      CAST(-9999 AS INT) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,   
      NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,     
     COALESCE(NCB.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  NCB.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ,
 COALESCE(NSOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS POB_TYPE_CD  /* NRS MPOB Change */
  ,COALESCE(NSOA_MPOB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,'N') AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG  /* NRS PI3 Change */
   				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM 
   (
    SELECT
    NSCAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
    NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
    NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY PRODUCT_KEY,
    NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY ORDER_QUANTITY,
    NSOLT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
    NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    NSOLT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
    NSCAT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
    NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    NSCAT.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
    NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    NSCAT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
    NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
    NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME ORDER_DATETIME,
    NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
    NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
    '=' SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG ,
    NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG /* Added by OM LSS team for Q3FY14 */,
 NSOVT.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NSOLT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NSOLT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NSOLT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT,
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT,
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT, /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV NSCAT
    WHERE NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    /* AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY15*/
 AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL', 'SBP')  /* XAAS FCM Q4FY16*/ 
    AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSCAT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

    AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'

    AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00' /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    AND NSCAT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOT.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
    AND COALESCE ( NSOT.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
    AND NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
    AND NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
    AND NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('QTC','BV')
	AND NSOT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
    AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/

    
    UNION ALL /* UNION ALL is added by OM LSS team for Q2FY14 */
    
    SELECT
    NSCAT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
    NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
    NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY PRODUCT_KEY,
    NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY ORDER_QUANTITY,
    NSOLT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
    NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    NSOLT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
    NSCAT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
    NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    NSCAT.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
    NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    NSCAT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
    NSOT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
    NSOT.ORDER_DATETIME ORDER_DATETIME,
    NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
    NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
    NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
    CASE WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG ELSE NSOLVT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
    END ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG /* Added by OM LSS for Hybrid Scenario */  ,
 NSOVT.CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
     				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NSOLT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NSOLT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NSOLT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT,
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT,
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT, /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV NSCAT,
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT
    WHERE NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */
    /* AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15*/
 AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL', 'SBP') /* FCM XAAS Q4FY16*/ 
    AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    AND NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSCAT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND NSOLVT.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
    AND NSOTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
    AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'  
    AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOVT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00.00.00' /* Added FOR CCW-RF-EXCESS ORDER Change */ 
    AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSCAT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSOT.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
    AND COALESCE ( NSOT.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
    AND NSOT.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
    AND NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
    AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	AND NSOT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
    AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/

    ) NCB
      /* Used TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY instead of SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY from custom table as part of OA-Q3FY15*/
      LEFT  OUTER  JOIN ( SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV  WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG ='N' AND END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))AND POB_TYPE_CD='UNKNOWN' GROUP  BY 1) NSOA
      ON (NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  )
	LEFT  OUTER  JOIN ( SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,POB_TYPE_CD, NRS_TRANSITION_FLG  FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV  WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG ='N' AND END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND POB_TYPE_CD='MPOB'  AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET'   GROUP  BY 1,2, 3) NSOA_MPOB /* NRS MPOB Change */
        ON (NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  )
   
   CROSS JOIN
   (
    SELECT 
    NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
    NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
    BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
    BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, 
    $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
    WHERE NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
   ) FMNI
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER_TV NSEC
   ON (NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSEC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSEC.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
  
   INNER  JOIN   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_NCB_TV SOL  
   ON (SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND SOL.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
  
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_NCB_TV SO
   ON ( SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   AND SO.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON (NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=NCB.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=COALESCE(CAST(NCB.ORDER_DATETIME AS DATE),
   CAST(NCB.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE))
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='Corporate')
      
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_TV
   WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')CUST_ACCT
   ON SO.DD_NCB_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=CUST_ACCT.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY
   AND CUST_ACCT.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE='BILL_TO'
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
   SELECT 
   NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
   NEP.PARTY_KEY PARTY_KEY
   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA,
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
   WHERE NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
   AND NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   AND NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' ) PARTY
   ON SO.DD_NCB_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY=PARTY.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (
   SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV 
   WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') SOLD_TO_PARENT
   ON PARTY.PARTY_KEY=SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (
   SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV 
   WHERE END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') BILL_TO_PARENT
   ON CUST_ACCT.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
  ) NCB1
  
  LEFT JOIN( 
  SELECT  
  DISTINCT 
  EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  EST.TERRITORY_NODE_LEVEL1_CODE ,
  ESP.RULE_CD RULE_CD
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST,
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHN_SP_NODES ESP
  WHERE EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ESP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) ESP_RULE
  ON (NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ESP_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)
  
  LEFT JOIN(
  SELECT 
  DISTINCT 
  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY) ELST
  ON( ELST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE LIKE 'CORP%.%REVENUE'
  AND SUBSTR(ELST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE,1,9) <>'I/C CISCO')
  
  LEFT JOIN(
  SELECT 
  DISTINCT 
  NCPC.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE, 
  NCPST.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE_TV NCPST
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPC
  ON NCPST.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY=NCPC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  AND  NCPST.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01') PTC
  ON NCB1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY1 = PTC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY    
  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY
  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF     
  ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
  
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC    /* NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS NCB FLAG Column */
 ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
 AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE

SELECT
    NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
    ,START_TV_DT                   
    ,END_TV_DT                     
    ,DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY           
    ,DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT   
    ,DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT  
    ,DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT      
    ,DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG            
    ,DV_NCB_MISC_FLG               
    ,DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG            
    ,DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
    ,DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG
    ,DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY            
    ,DD_NCB_INVOICED_QTY_AMT       
    ,DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT 
    ,DD_NCB_SS_CD                  
    ,DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT 
    ,DD_NCB_ORDER_QTY              
    ,DD_NCB_PROMISED_CUST_SHIP_DT  
    ,DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   
    ,DD_NCB_SO_LINE_SOURCE_CRT_DTM 
    ,DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD        
    ,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
    ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
    ,NCB.EDW_CREATE_USER               
    ,NCB.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
    ,NCB.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
    ,NCB.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
    ,CONVERSION_RT                 
    ,ORDER_DTM
    ,CASE WHEN (NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL OR NSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL ) THEN 'BUNDLE' ELSE 'STANDALONE' 
    END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  /*OA - Q3FY15 */
    ,CAST(-9999 AS INT) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    
    ,NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      
    ,COALESCE(NCB.DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,COALESCE(NSOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
    ,COALESCE(NSOA_MPOB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,'N')
    FROM
    /* Used TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY instead of SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY from custom table as part of OA-Q3FY15*/
    ( SEL *  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_NCB_TV  WHERE  END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' )  NCB
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV   
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG ='N' AND END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AND POB_TYPE_CD='UNKNOWN' GROUP  BY 1) NSOA
     ON NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*Q3FY15 */                           
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,POB_TYPE_CD, NRS_TRANSITION_FLG  FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV   
     WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG ='N' AND END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  AND POB_TYPE_CD='MPOB'  AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET'   GROUP  BY 1,2, 3) NSOA_MPOB
     ON NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*NRS */    
     /*ACV*/WHERE NCB.TRX_TYPE_CD IN ('ERP') AND NCB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY < 0

SELECT
    NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE),
    CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
    NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
    /*Used BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY instead of  ORDER_QUANTITY to derive NET PRICE for ATTRIBUTED RECORDS 
    derived the unit sale price for attributed records - OA Q1FY15*/
    CAST(CAST(CAST((COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE,0.000000) * COALESCE(NSOL.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0.00)/100.00000000) as decimal(18,6)) * 
    (COALESCE(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,0)-COALESCE(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0))  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
    *COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))
    AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
    /*Multiplied the LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT with ATTRIBUTION_PCT to derive LIST PRICE for ATTRIBUTED RECORDS - Q1FY15 - OFFER ATTRIBUTION */
    /* Used BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY instead of  PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY to derive LIST PRICE for ATTRIBUTED RECORDS - OA Q1FY15*/
    CASE
       WHEN NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE=0.000000 THEN 0.000000
       ELSE CAST ( CAST(  COALESCE(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,0.000000) * (COALESCE(NSOL.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0.00) /100.00000000)   AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
      (COALESCE(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,0)-COALESCE(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0) )AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
    END  AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
     /*Used BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY instead of  ORDER_QUANTITY to derive COST AMOUNT for ATTRIBUTED RECORDS 
     Derived the standard cost amount for attributed records and included the brackets for quantity derivation - OA Q1FY15*/
    CASE
          WHEN NSOL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME LIKE 'Invoice Only%'
          AND   COALESCE(NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,'UNKONOWN') <> 'Demo/Eval' THEN 0.000000
          ELSE CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000)* (COALESCE(NSOL.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0.00) /100.00000000)   AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
    (COALESCE(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,0)-COALESCE(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0)) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
    END                                                        AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
    
    COALESCE(
    CASE
       WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y'
       ELSE 'N'
    END ,'=')                                                  AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
    COALESCE(
    CASE
       WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y'
       ELSE 'N'
    END ,'=')                                                  AS DV_NCB_misc_FLG,
    COALESCE(
    CASE
       WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' THEN 'Y'
       ELSE 'N'
    END  ,'=')                                          AS DD_SERVICE_FLAG,
    NSOL.CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG,
    NSOL.IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
    COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)              AS PRODUCT_KEY,
    NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,
    NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
    NSOL.SS_CODE,
    NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
    NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
    CAST(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS DATE),
    NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME          AS TIMESTAMP(0)) ,
    NSOL.ORDER_STATUS                                    AS ORDER_STATUS,
    NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
    FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
    USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
    USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
    COALESCE(
          CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
          CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))
          )                                                  AS CONVERSION_RT,
    NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME                          AS ORDER_DTM,
    NSOL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
    NSOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
    NSOL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NSOL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
        ,NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
  ,NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 Change */
    FROM
    (
          SELECT
          NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
          CASE
                 WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=0 THEN  'ENTERED'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=1 THEN  'CFS HOLD'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=2 THEN  'AUTODISCOUNT HOLD'
              ELSE   'BOTH'
          END                                     AS ORDER_STATUS,
          COALESCE
          (
          CASE
                 WHEN SUM(NSOL.CFS_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'
                 ELSE 'N' END ,'='
          )                                            AS CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG,
          COALESCE
          (
          CASE
                 WHEN SUM(NSOL.IC_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'
                 ELSE 'N' END ,'='
          )                                            AS IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
          MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)       AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
          MAX(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY) AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
    MAX(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY) AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY, /*Added as part of OA Q1FY15*/
          MAX(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE)    AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
          MAX(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)         AS PRODUCT_KEY,
          MAX(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY) AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
          MAX(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
          MAX(NSOL.SS_CODE)                   AS SS_CODE,
          MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)  AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
          MAX(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE)  AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
          MAX(NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)                AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
          MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)            AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
          MAX(NSOL.BOOKINGS_PERCENT)                   AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
          MAX(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)  AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
          MAX(NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME)  AS PRICING_DATETIME,
          MAX(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)     AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
          MAX(NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE)           AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
          MAX(NSOL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE)               AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
          MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)            AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
          MAX(NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME)  AS ORDER_DATETIME,
          MAX(NSOL.CANCELLED_FLAG)  AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
          MAX(NSOL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)                    AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
          MAX(NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE)    AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
          MAX(DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
          MAX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)  AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
          MAX(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT)  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
          MAX(DV_PRODUCT_KEY)  AS  DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.ATTRIBUTION_PCT) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*Added as part of Q1FY15 - OFFER ATTRIBUTION*/ 
      ,NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD
   ,NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
          FROM(
                SELECT  
                NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /* Q3FY15 hardcode to -9999 if SOL is not required to be published */ 
                 COALESCE
                 ((
                 CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1                  
             WHEN NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'CG' AND LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='IC Special Discount'  THEN 2   
          WHEN NSOLT.SS_CODE='CG' AND (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                       LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required') THEN 2 
          ELSE 0 END),0 
                 )                                                               AS ORDER_STATUS,
                 COALESCE
                 ((
                 CASE
                       WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
                     ELSE 0 END),0
                 )                                                               AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
                 COALESCE(
                 (
                 CASE
                       WHEN ((NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'CG' AND LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='IC Special Discount')  OR
                         (NSOLT.SS_CODE='CG' AND (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                               LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required')))
                       THEN 1 ELSE 0
                 END),0)  AS IC_FLAG_STATUS,
                 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                            AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
                 COALESCE (NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,0) AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
       /* derived Bundle quantity to calculate List price -Q1FY15 Offer Attribution*/
       CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET', 'BIB OFFSET') THEN   (COALESCE (-1 * NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0))
          ELSE COALESCE (NSOLT.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) 
          END AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,         
                /*((COALESCE(NSOLT.UNIT_SALE_PRICE,0)  * COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0))/100) AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
                Used OA unit selling price  instead of the above derivation -Q1FY15*/
                /*COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0) AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE, 
       Used bundle UNIT_SALE_PRICE - OA Q1FY15*/
       NSOLT.UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
                 CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET') THEN COALESCE(NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) ELSE NSOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY    END AS PRODUCT_KEY,
                /* NSOLT.INVOICED_QUANTITY            AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
        negated the OFFSET record  OA Q1FY15*/
        CASE WHEN NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET', 'BIB OFFSET') THEN   (COALESCE (-1 * NSOLT.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0))
          ELSE COALESCE (NSOLT.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0) 
          END AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,  
                 NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT         AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
                 NSOLT.SS_CODE                                 AS SS_CODE,
                 NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT                    AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
                 NSOLT.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE     AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
                 NSOLT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                 NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                  AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
                 NSOLT.BOOKINGS_PERCENT                               AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
                 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE     AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
                 NSOLT.PRICING_DATETIME                            AS PRICING_DATETIME,
                 ((COALESCE (NSOLT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0))/100.00000000) AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
                 NSO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE        AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
                 NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE             AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
                 NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME  AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
                NSO.ORDER_DATETIME                     AS ORDER_DATETIME,
                NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG                      AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
                NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME                  AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
                NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,    
                NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
                NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT     ,     
                COALESCE(NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
                NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*Added as part of Q1FY15 - OFFER ATTRIBUTION*/    
      ,NSOA.POB_TYPE_CD
     ,NSOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
                 FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
                INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
                ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
       /*AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15*/
       AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL','SBP') /* FCM XAAS Q4FY16*/ 
                AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'  
       AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
                AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
                AND NSO. CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
             AND  COALESCE ( NSO.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
                AND NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
                AND NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00'
       AND NSO.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
       AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
                /*AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'CG'     Removed as part of Q4FY14 Offer Attribution */                                      
                /* Added as part of OM LSS Project */
       ) 
                INNER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION   NSOA 
                ON  NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    /* Added as part of offer attribution */
                LEFT OUTER  JOIN
                $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE LINEHOLD
                ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=LINEHOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
          ) NSOL
          GROUP BY NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD, NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
    )NSOL
    
    CROSS JOIN
    (
    SELECT
    NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
    NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
    BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
    BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
    FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
    $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
    WHERE
    NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
    ) FMNI
    
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN
    $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY )
    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
    ON (NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
     AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
     AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=COALESCE(CAST(NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME AS DATE),CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO AS DATE))
     AND  NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='Corporate')
    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT
    ON(NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
     AND NPPT.ITEM_KEY =  NSOL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY /*Changed join to DV_PRODUCT_KEY - Q1FY15 - OFFER ATTRIBUTION*/
     AND NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME BETWEEN CAST(NPPT.START_TV_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0))
     AND CAST (NPPT.END_TV_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) )
    INNER JOIN
    (
    SELECT
    NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME     AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
    NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY                       AS PRODUCT_KEY,
    NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT           AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
    
    INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
    ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    /*AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD<>'SBP' /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15*/
    AND NSOLT.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('TSL','SBP')  /* FCM XAAS Q4FY16*/
    AND NSOLT.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG = 'N'
    AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'
    AND NSO. CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE='N'
    AND COALESCE ( NSO.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD, '=') <>'CLOSED'
    AND NSO.CANCELLED_FLAG<>'Y'
    AND NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME >='2001-07-29 00:00:00' 
    AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
    AND NSO.SS_CODE<>'OPL' /*Q2FY18 XAAS*/
    /*AND NSOLT.SS_CODE<>'CG'  Removed as part of Q4FY14 Offer Attribution */                                    
    /* Added as part of OM LSS Project */
    )
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
    ON( NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
    AND NSC.ITEM_KEY = NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY
    AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)
    
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (
     PARTITION BY
     NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY
    ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC )=1
    ) NSC
    ON(NSOL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
    WHERE NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (167482285,167505750)
